creator: dhorn2000@gmail.com
text:
Binary (pkg) packages do not seem to have been rebuilt yet for 14 since Sep-02-2023. See https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/ if you want to monitor.

Will re-test once package builds seem to be updated.   In the mean time (even with 14.0 Beta 1), building this port from source seems to solve the issue for me.
